caption: A news broadcast from News18 India features a scene with several people gathered indoors. In the center, a woman wearing a brown shawl and a man in a grey vest and white shirt are visible, surrounded by other individuals. To the left, a small inset shows a man in a white garment, and to the right, another inset shows a man in a white shirt. Red and white banners with Hindi text appear throughout. The top banners consistently read "नीतीश को तेजस्वी की 'सीधी धमकी'". The bottom news ticker changes across the sequence; it starts with "जे. पी. नड्डा: बिहार में NDA क्लीन स्वीप करेगा", then changes to "जे. पी. नड्डा: 1", and finally reads "जे. पी. नड्डा: I.N.D.I. गठबंधन चलने वाला नहीं है". The News18 India logo is present in the top right, and a timestamp of "10:06 PM" is visible at the bottom right.
